events.title: US Strikes Iran Following Strait of Hormuz Incident
events.desc: The US military conducted strikes on missile sites and command centers in Iran following an incident involving attacks on cargo ships in the Strait of Hormuz. Iran claimed to have attacked US bases in response, escalating tensions in the region. This exchange threatens a previously agreed-upon interim peace deal.

events.title: Iran Escalates with Retaliatory Strikes on US Infrastructure
events.desc: Iran announced retaliatory attacks on US infrastructure in Kuwait and Bahrain following US strikes across Iran. This action directly violates the ceasefire and escalates the conflict, with both sides accusing each other of breaking their agreements.

events.title: Trump Threatens Further Strikes on Iran
events.desc: US President Donald Trump stated that the US would 'probably' carry out another round of strikes on Iran, suggesting the interim peace deal was 'over'. This indicates a potential shift back towards full-scale conflict despite previous diplomatic efforts.

events.title: Israeli Airstrikes Kill Seven Palestinians in Gaza
events.desc: At least seven Palestinians, including two children, were killed in Israeli airstrikes and gunfire in the Gaza Strip. The Israeli military stated it struck militants but was unaware of civilian casualties, highlighting ongoing conflict and the risk to non-combatants.

events.title: Pakistan Military Reports 42 Killed in Balochistan Fighter Attacks
events.desc: The Pakistan military announced that 42 individuals were killed in fighter attacks in Balochistan. A military spokesman vowed to pursue the attackers, indicating a significant escalation of violence and a strong retaliatory stance from Pakistan.

events.title: Bombings in Damascus Kill Nine
events.desc: A bomb blast at a cafe in Damascus killed nine people. The bombing occurred near the Palace of Justice, a significant government building, raising concerns about the security situation in the Syrian capital.

events.title: Headteacher Among Four Killed in Israeli Attack on Southern Lebanon
events.desc: An Israeli strike in southern Lebanon killed four people, including a headteacher, who were travelling in a car. This marks the deadliest attack since the latest ceasefire, indicating a breakdown in the cessation of hostilities.

events.title: Russian Diesel Export Ban Amid Ukrainian Drone Attacks
events.desc: Russia has imposed a ban on diesel exports to secure domestic supply following intensified Ukrainian drone attacks on oil refineries. These attacks have led to shortages and price spikes, impacting fuel availability.

events.title: US Charges Indian Crime Leader in Sikh Activist Assassination
events.desc: The United States has indicted an Indian crime leader and linked him to the assassination of a Sikh activist. This development has strained India-Canada relations and highlights the transnational nature of targeted killings.

events.title: US Mediation Plan for Libya Involves Oil Investments for Unity
events.desc: A US-led mediation plan for Libya, spearheaded by Massad Boulos, proposes oil investments as an incentive for rival factions to cooperate. This initiative aims to stabilize the country through economic leverage.

events.title: Germany Urges US-Iran Negotiations and Offers Minesweeping Support
events.desc: German Foreign Minister Johann Wadephul has called for renewed negotiations between the US and Iran, while also offering to assist with minesweeping operations in the Strait of Hormuz, signaling a diplomatic push to de-escalate tensions.

events.title: Trump Considers Removing Syria from Terrorist Blacklist
events.desc: President Donald Trump indicated that the US is prepared to remove Syria from its terror blacklist. This move could significantly impact Syria's post-war reconstruction efforts.

events.title: Lebanon's Aoun to Meet Trump Amid US-Israel Talks
events.desc: Lebanese President Aoun is scheduled to meet with President Trump in the US, marking the first presidential summit between the two nations since 2009. The meeting coincides with ongoing US-sponsored negotiations between Lebanon and Israel.

events.title: Trump Board of Peace Planning Humanitarian Zone in Gaza
events.desc: Donald Trump's Board of Peace is developing plans for a pilot humanitarian zone in Gaza, aimed at revitalizing the stalled peace process. This initiative will proceed regardless of a deal with Hamas on the plan's second phase.

events.title: IMF Lowers 2026 Global Growth Forecast Amid Middle East Conflict
events.desc: The International Monetary Fund (IMF) has reduced its 2026 global growth forecast, citing "uncertainty and risks" associated with renewed fighting in the Middle East. The conflict is impacting the economic outlook, highlighting geopolitical instability's broader effects.
